title: A Secret Under the Floor
content: During home repairs, one of the wooden floorboards came loose. Beneath it, Emma found a small metal box wrapped in cloth. Inside were several coins, handwritten recipes, and a family photograph. Her grandmother immediately recognized the items. They had belonged to Emma's great-grandmother, who had hidden them many years earlier during a difficult time. The discovery became a special family moment instead of the treasure hunt everyone had imagined.
